comment: FR-SPD-002 speed-ramp audio: a 1x -> 2x time-remap curve (keyframes 0->0, 1/2->1/2, 1->3/2) over an ascending-staircase source. Output frames at t=0..7/8 must read source samples 0,1,2,3,4,6,8,10. The constant-rate chord of the same curve (1.5x) would read 0,1.5,3,4.5,6,7.5,9,10.5 and a dropped curve (1x) would read 0..7, so any constant-speed regression fails by >= 0.5 against a 1e-5 tolerance.
